day1_lunch_start.text: *Fourth period is over and the lunch bell rings. Students get up all at once.*

day1_lunch_choice.name: Me
choices: Sea asked me to eat together, so I'll stay in the classroom
I'll check out the quiet library
I have a bit of a headache... maybe I'll go to the nurse's office
I'll eat alone on the rooftop

day1_lunch_sea_1.text: *Sea pushes two desks together and pulls a lunchbox out of her bag.*

day1_lunch_sea_2.text: *...It's a two-tier lunchbox. Clearly not a single serving.*

day1_lunch_sea_4.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_4.text: Well? Good enough to sell, right?

day1_lunch_sea_5.text: *She opens the lid. Rolled omelet, mini sausages, rice balls, broccoli, cherry tomatoes. Neatly arranged by color.*

day1_lunch_sea_6.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_6.text: ...Wow. You really made all of this yourself?

day1_lunch_sea_7.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_7.text: Try it. I had a feeling this would suit you better than store-bought bread.

day1_lunch_sea_8.text: *Sea picks up a piece of rolled omelet with her chopsticks and holds it out.*

day1_lunch_sea_9.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_9.text: Here, try the omelet first. I made it on the sweet side.

day1_lunch_sea_13.text: *Sea breaks into a wide smile. This smile doesn't feel fake.*

day1_lunch_sea_14.text: *We chatted for quite a while after that.*

day1_lunch_sea_15.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_15.text: Do you always bring a lunchbox like this, Sea?

day1_lunch_sea_16.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_16.text: Yeah. The school cafeteria is fine and all, but homemade tastes better.

day1_lunch_sea_17.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_17.text: Seems like a lot for one person, though.

day1_lunch_sea_19.text: *Sea pauses for a moment, then smiles.*

day1_lunch_sea_20.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_20.text: I tend to make a lot. I'm glad you're eating so much.

day1_lunch_sea_21.text: *The lunchbox is almost empty. There's some time left.*

day1_lunch_sea_23.text: *Sea hands me one of her earbuds. A mellow guitar track.*

day1_lunch_sea_25.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_25.text: I've been listening to it a lot lately. The lyrics are nice.

day1_lunch_sea_27.name: Me
day1_lunch_sea_27.text: It's good. You've got nice taste in music.

day1_lunch_sea_28.name: Han Sea
day1_lunch_sea_28.text: Haha, you say that like it's obvious.

day1_lunch_sea_29.text: *We talked about music, YouTube, and time flew by. It felt comfortable. Even though it's the first day.*

day1_lunch_yuna_1.text: *I entered the library. It's almost empty since it's lunchtime.*

day1_lunch_yuna_2.text: *I was about to sit in a corner seat when I heard a 'click.'*

day1_lunch_yuna_3.text: *A girl with a camera is frozen with a startled expression. Small build, big camera.*

day1_lunch_yuna_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_4.text: ...Did you just take a picture of me?

day1_lunch_yuna_5.name: Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_5.text: N-no...! I'm in the photography club, I was taking pictures of the library atmosphere and you suddenly walked in...

day1_lunch_yuna_6.name: Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_6.text: Ah... I'm sorry. I'll delete it right away.

day1_lunch_yuna_7.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_7.text: No, it's fine. So you're in the photography club.

day1_lunch_yuna_8.name: Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_8.text: Yes...! I'm Yuna Choi, first year. You're the transfer student, right?

day1_lunch_yuna_9.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_9.text: Yeah. I'm {name}. Nice to meet you.

day1_lunch_yuna_10.text: *Yuna clutches the camera to her chest and bows her head.*

day1_lunch_yuna_11.name: Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_11.text: Do you come to the library often? I'm here every day.

day1_lunch_yuna_12.text: *Yuna shows me her photos. School scenery, cherry blossoms, a cat by the gymnasium.*

day1_lunch_yuna_13.text: *Scrolling through, I found a series of the same cherry tree shot at different times of day. Morning, noon, sunset, night.*

day1_lunch_yuna_14.name: Me
day1_lunch_yuna_14.text: ...You shot the same tree four times?

day1_lunch_yuna_15.name: Yuna
day1_lunch_yuna_15.text: I love how the colors change with the light. I took these over the course of a month.

day1_lunch_yuna_16.text: *A total photography nerd. At this level, she might as well be a pro.*

day1_lunch_riin_1.text: *I opened the door to the nurse's office. A faint smell of disinfectant.*

day1_lunch_riin_2.text: *Short dark purple bob, white coat, thin-framed glasses. She's leaning back in her chair, reading something.*

day1_lunch_riin_3.name: Riin
day1_lunch_riin_3.text: Oh, the nurse's office on your first day? Are you feeling sick?

day1_lunch_riin_4.name: Me
day1_lunch_riin_4.text: I have a bit of a headache.

day1_lunch_riin_6.text: *Ms. Riin touches my forehead. Her hand is cool.*

day1_lunch_riin_7.name: Riin
day1_lunch_riin_7.text: No fever. It's a tension headache. Totally normal on your first day.

day1_lunch_riin_8.text: *She opens a drawer and takes out some medicine, smiling.*

day1_lunch_riin_9.name: Riin
day1_lunch_riin_9.text: Have you eaten? You shouldn't take medicine on an empty stomach.

day1_lunch_riin_11.name: Riin
day1_lunch_riin_11.text: If you're sleepy, feel free to rest here for a bit.

day1_lunch_alone_1.text: *I climbed the stairs and opened the rooftop door. The wind hits me full on.*

day1_lunch_alone_2.text: *I eat a rice ball while looking down at the sports field.*

day1_lunch_alone_3.text: *...Huh? In the corner of the field, someone seems to be pointing a camera this way...*

day1_lunch_alone_4.text: *No, it's too far away. Must be my imagination.*

day1_lunch_alone_5.text: *...There are scratch marks under the railing. Old grooves. Could be writing... but I can't read it.*

day1_lunch_end.text: *Lunch is over. Time for afternoon classes.*
